mapper.sql: id, user_id, client_name, client_id, client_secret_enc, client_secret_fingerprint, scopes::text AS scopes_json, status, token_ttl_seconds, signature_valid_seconds, allowed_ips::text AS allowed_ips_json, to_char(last_called_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS last_called_at, to_char(secret_rotated_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS secret_rotated_at, to_char(disabled_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS disabled_at, to_char(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at, to_char(updated_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM hub_external_api_client WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hub_external_api_client ( user_id, client_name, client_id, client_secret_enc, client_secret_fingerprint, scopes, status, token_ttl_seconds, signature_valid_seconds, allowed_ips ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{clientName}, #{clientId}, #{clientSecretEnc}, #{clientSecretFingerprint}, CAST(#{scopesJson} AS jsonb), #{status}, #{tokenTtlSeconds}, #{signatureValidSeconds}, CAST(#{allowedIpsJson} AS jsonb) )
